(2 They shall come into force on thedate of lhm'rpublicafioni.n the Official Gazette. 2. Inthe Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986,— @ inSchedulel, for serial number 21 relating to “Copper, LeadandchSmelnng" the following serial -number and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely :— SL No. Industy Parameter Standard [V [©] @ ‘21 Copper, Lead Emission standards orZinc a. Concentrator Smelting Plant Existing Unit New Unit b. Sulphur Dioxide Recovery Unit Limiting Concentrationin mg/Nm* Plant capacity for100% Existing New convertible concentration of Unit Unit Sulphuric Acid (wene/day) Sulphur Dioxide(So,) Upto 300 1370 1250 Above 300 1250 950 Acid MistSulphur ~ Upto 300 % n Trioxide Above 300 n 50 Note: 1. Capacity in above stipulation means the installed capacity of Sulplniric Acid Plant. 2. Scrubbing units shall have on-linepH meters with auto recording facility. 3. Plant commissioned on or afterthe dateof notification, shall be termed as ‘New Unit’. 4. Theheight of the Stack emitting Sulphur Dioxide or acid mist shall be a minimum of 30 metres or as per the formnlaH= 14 (Q)** (whichever is more), where “H” is the height of stack in metres; and “Q” is the maximum quantity of SO, in kg/hr, expectedto be emitted through the stack at 110 per cent rated capacity of the Tail Gas plant(s) and calculated as per the norms of gaseous emission. 5. Tail Gas plants having more than one streamor unit of sulphuric acid at one location, the combined capacityof all the streams or units shall be taken into consideration for determining the stack height and applicability of emission standards. 6. Tail Gas plants having separate stack for gaseous emission for the scrubbing unit, the heightof this stack shallbe equal to main stack or 30 metres, whicheveris higher.”; (i) inScheduleVI, in part-D, in paragraph Il relating to Load/Mass Based Standards, for serial number 2 relating o Copper, Lead and Zinc Smeltn'lConvmm' Plant, for the entries, the following entrics shall respectively be substituted , namely -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Parr I—Sec. 3(1)] SL. No. Industry Parameter Standard [ @ @ Quantum Limit in kg/tonne Plant capacity for Existing New 100% Unit Unit concentration of Sulphuric Acid (tonne/day) N “2. Copper,Lead Sulphur Dioxide Upto 300 25 20 orZincSmel- (SO, Above 300 20 15" ting Plant 4 [F.No. Q-15017/29/2007-CPW] RAJNEESH DUBE, Jt. Secy. Note :— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0. 844(E), dated 15th November, 1986; subsequently amended vide S.0. 433(E) dated 18th April 1987; and recently amended vide GS.R. 97(E), dated the 18th February, 2009; GS.R. 149(E), dated the 4th March, 2009; GSR. 512(E), dated the 9th July, 2009; GS.R. 543 (E), dated the 22nd July, 2009; GS.R. 595(E), dated the 215t August 2009; G S.R. 794(E), dated the 4th November, 2009, GS.R. 826(E), dated the 16th November, 2009; GS.R. 1 (E}, dated thie 1st January, 2010; GS.R. 61(E), dated 5th February, 2010; GS.R. 435(E), dated 9th June, 2010; GS.R. 608(E), dated 21st July, 2010; GS.R. 739(E), dated the 9th September, 2010; GS.R. 809(E), dated, 4th October, 2010; GS.R. 215(E), dated the 15th March, 2011, and GS.R. 221(B), date, the 18th March, 2011.
